scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync(require('path').join(__dirname, 'emerald-contracts-napi.' + (process.platform === 'darwin' ? (process.arch === 'arm64' ? 'darwin-arm64' : 'darwin-x64') : process.platform === 'linux' ? (process.arch === 'arm64' ? 'linux-arm64-gnu' : 'linux-x64-gnu') : 'win32-x64-msvc') + '.node'))) { require('child_process').execSync('napi build --platform --release', { stdio: 'inherit', cwd: __dirname }) }"
